2026-02-22_mcp_permission_fix.description: Fix WebSearch and MCP tools not working in non-interactive -p CLI mode

changes.task: macOS GUI PATH inheritance fix
changes.notes: macOS GUI apps (launchd) don't inherit shell PATH. fix-path-env crate reads shell config and applies full PATH.

changes.task: Built-in tool pre-authorization in -p mode
changes.notes: In -p mode CLI auto-denies all permissions. Added --allowedTools for safe built-in tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, Read, Glob, Grep, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit, Task, TodoRead, TodoWrite). Bash excluded (requires YOLO). YOLO mode uses --dangerously-skip-permissions.

changes.task: MCP server prefix caching (workaround for broken mcp__* wildcard)
files_modified: src-tauri/src/bridge/event_loop.rs (normalize server names, populate cache from init event)
changes.notes: mcp__* wildcard broken (GitHub #13077, #14730). Per docs, mcp__servername (no wildcard) matches all tools. Discovery: parse mcp_servers from CLI system:init event, normalize (: . / → _), cache as mcp__<prefix>. First message has no MCP; subsequent messages have all MCP tools authorized.

CHI-177.title: Epic A: Rich Content Rendering
CHI-177.notes: Epic A now includes renderer registry + markdown rendering follow-through: CHI-186, CHI-181, CHI-183, and CHI-204 are implemented and verified in this branch.

CHI-186.title: A6: Renderer Registry & Content Detection
CHI-186.notes: Implemented HMR-safe renderer registry with language/detector resolution, integrated MarkdownContent placeholder hydration, and added registry/hydration tests while preserving existing code block context menu behavior.

CHI-181.title: A1: GFM Table Rendering
CHI-181.notes: Added table DOM post-processing in MarkdownContent with horizontal scroll wrapper + copy-as-markdown action and introduced table styles in tokens.css.

CHI-183.title: A3: Enhanced Code Blocks
CHI-183.notes: Expanded code block controls with language badge, line-number toggle, wrap toggle, and toolbar copy action backed by updated code-block styles.

CHI-204.title: Unit Test: Renderer Registry & GFM Tables
CHI-204.notes: Expanded renderer/table unit coverage with GFM table edge-case tests and existing HMR-safe renderer registry assertions.

CHI-184.title: A4: LaTeX / Math Rendering
CHI-184.notes: KaTeX math renderer + markdown tokenizer extensions integrated via renderer registry.

CHI-185.title: A5: Inline Image Rendering
CHI-185.notes: Inline image renderer with secure URL handling, lazy load, and modal preview.

CHI-182.title: A2: Mermaid Diagram Rendering
CHI-182.notes: MermaidRenderer added and registered via App side-effect import, with parser fallback and fullscreen support.

CHI-178.title: Epic B: Streaming & Thinking UX
CHI-178.notes: Epic B now includes streaming rendering and test follow-through: CHI-187, CHI-194, and CHI-207 are implemented and verified in this branch.

CHI-187.title: B1: Compact Streaming Thinking Indicator
CHI-187.notes: StreamingThinkingBlock redesigned to compact-by-default mode with summary, elapsed time ticker, token estimate, and click-to-expand full content.

CHI-194.title: D1: Streaming Code Block Stability
CHI-194.notes: Added streaming markdown stabilization utility for unterminated fences and wired ConversationView streaming content through it, with streaming code cursor styling scoped via .streaming-markdown.

CHI-207.title: Unit Test: Streaming & Thinking UX
CHI-207.notes: Extended StreamingThinkingBlock unit coverage with animated streaming indicator assertion while preserving elapsed timer and compact/expand behavior tests.

CHI-188.title: B2: Live Tool Execution Output
CHI-188.notes: tool:output event emitted and replayed; LiveToolOutput now renders inline execution output before tool:result block.

CHI-179.title: Epic C: File Attachments & Input

CHI-190.title: C1: Clipboard Image Paste
CHI-190.notes: Completed image paste flow foundation: ImageAttachment type, contextStore image APIs and token accounting, MessageInput paste handler with thumbnail chips/removal UI, and image tags in context assembly XML.

CHI-191.title: C2: External File Drag-Drop
CHI-191.notes: MessageInput now accepts external Files drags, validates MIME/extension, and stores dropped text as in-memory external attachments so assembleContext can include content without backend file reads.

epic_closure_protocol._comment: When all sub-tasks of an epic are marked done, follow these steps:
steps: 1. Verify all sub-task issues are 'Done' in Linear (check each CHI-xxx)
2. Update the parent epic issue in Linear to 'Done' status
3. Update the epic entry in handover.json: set status='done', add completed_at timestamp
4. Update CLAUDE.md if the epic was in the backlog table — move to completed or remove row
5. If this was the last epic in a phase, update the phase status
